pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which generates the file at this path.
Code analysis of verifier.py which defines PEAK_RATE = 0.28.
Code analysis of verifier.py which defines OFFPEAK_RATE = 0.11.
Code analysis of verifier.py which checks gt_hour >= 14 and gt_hour <= 19.
Code analysis of verifier.py which loads these two sheets, and setup_task.sh which creates MeterData.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic hourly load data located at /home/ga/Documents/hourly_load_data.xlsx containing a 'MeterData' sheet. Peak billing rates are $0.28/kWh (occurring between 14:00 and 19:59 inclusive on weekdays) and off-peak rates are $0.11/kWh. A summary table must be created in a new sheet called 'Monthly_Summary'.
